summary: Iter 106 — Database Viewer/Editor + Public Base URL config + Excel attendance import + reworked /join-qr (TWO QR codes) + /get-app landing page + /company-login prefill. Backend 15/15 pytest PASS (db viewer collections/filters/PUT/DELETE + 400/404 gates, super-admin gating verified with hospital emp token → 403, external VPS config lifecycle with local mongodb://localhost:27017 including source=external collection list + validation + CLEANUP clear, public-config GET + PUT validation (http:// required) + final set to https://www.smartpayrolling.com, Excel IN/OUT import to CCH firm with 4 punches inserted + re-upload dupe returns 0 inserts, sample xlsx download, missing-file 400, attendance cleanup). Frontend web (1920x1080) verified as super admin: /database-viewer sidebar entry 'Database Viewer / Editor' under Utility group present; collections list rendered 52 items with counts; testIDs dbv-src-local, dbv-src-external, dbv-settings, dbv-cfg-url/dbv-cfg-db/dbv-cfg-test/dbv-cfg-save all found; clicking users collection surfaces dbv-firm, dbv-emp, dbv-field, dbv-value, dbv-search and 20 dbv-edit-<id> Edit buttons; Edit modal (dbv-json textarea + dbv-save) opens with full JSON of hospital user Ward Boy Sunil. /join-qr: TWO cards appqr-employee + appqr-employer with 2 SVG QRcodes rendered, both URLs contain https://www.smartpayrolling.com/get-app?type=employee|employer, super-admin base-URL box (joinqr-base-input + joinqr-base-save) present with '✓ Active' green banner, Copy Link + Print QR buttons present per card, firm chips render (City Care Hospital, Kankani Enterprises). /get-app?type=employee&company=CCH shows 'Employee Registration' + Steps 1/2, manifest link resolves to /manifest-employee.json, click getapp-register → /employee-signup?company=CCH; /get-app?type=employer shows 'Employer Registration', manifest link resolves to /manifest-employer.json, click getapp-register → /company-register. /zk-dat-import: section '4. Or import from Excel (IN data separate · OUT data separate)' visible with zk-in-excel, zk-out-excel and zk-sample-download testIDs; Download Sample Format button rendered. /company-login?company=KEPS: Company Code tab pre-selected (dark chip) with Company code field pre-filled 'KEPS'. Regression: /employee-bulk-import firm dropdown lists Kankani + City Care Hospital (Iter 105 fix intact); /shift-approvals loads (1302 chars). ONE minor regression observation on /firm-master under super-admin All-Firms context — see design_issues.

issues: Under super-admin with top-right firm filter set to 'All firms', /firm-master appears to not auto-select a locked firm and body is nearly empty (no fm-variant-policy_1/policy_2 chips detected after 7s wait). Iter 105 report claimed it auto-loads Kankani. Might be regression OR expected only when a firm is scoped via the top-right filter. Please verify main-agent side — otherwise a smoke test-only issue.

Non-blocking RN-Web console warnings still present from earlier iterations: 'shadow*' deprecated, Invalid style property 'outline'/'background', 'Image style.resizeMode deprecated', 'props.pointerEvents deprecated'. Cosmetic only.

action_items: Investigate /firm-master with super-admin 'All firms' context — either auto-select a locked firm or show an explicit 'pick a firm' UI (currently near-empty body). Non-blocking regression concern.
Optional cleanup: migrate deprecated RN-Web style props (shadow*, outline, background shorthand, style.resizeMode, style.pointerEvents) to silence console noise (carried from iter 100/105).
critical_code_review_comments: routes/db_viewer.py — clean 290-line module. Super-admin gate via require_role, ObjectId parse gives 400 on bad id, replace_one gives 404 on missing doc, external VPS config masked in GET (password redacted regex). Motor client cached per (url,db) tuple to avoid reconnect churn. jsonable() handles ObjectId/date/datetime/bytes recursively — good.

server.py public-config endpoints (~line 16704) simple + tight: GET is public (returns configured value), PUT is super-admin-only with http/https prefix validation, empty value clears the setting. Good.

server.py zk-dat-import (~14916) now accepts in_excel + out_excel in addition to .dat files; Excel bytes are converted to .dat-shaped text via utils.zk_dat_import.excel_punches_to_dat_text and merged into the same idempotent pipeline. Re-upload deduplication confirmed empirically (0 inserts on 2nd upload).

database-viewer.tsx uses HTML <select data-testid='dbv-firm'/'dbv-emp'> which render only after a collection is picked — expected behavior, not a bug (initially collection list is shown with just source toggle + settings gear).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Iter 106 flows verified; 1 minor regression note on /firm-master under super-admin All-Firms)

seed_data_creation: During the Excel import test: 4 punches inserted into db.attendance for CCH bio_codes 901/902 on 2026-06-15 (both IN and OUT). CLEANED UP at end via db_viewer DELETE. Public base URL left set to https://www.smartpayrolling.com (as instructed). External VPS DB config was set to mongodb://localhost:27017 during testing then CLEARED (mongo_url='') so the setting is now empty — verified via final GET (configured:false).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 106 all-green. Cleanup performed: (a) attendance dupe rows on 2026-06-15 removed, (b) external VPS config cleared, (c) public_base_url left set at https://www.smartpayrolling.com. Reusable test file: test_iter106_db_viewer_public_config_excel_import.py. The DB viewer PUT/DELETE test targets whichever of shift_change_requests OR zk_dat_imports has an existing doc (self-heals), and restores the touched doc so nothing is left dirty. /firm-master under super-admin needs a top-right firm filter selected to render its policy variant chips — worth confirming with the main agent whether that's expected UX for the 'All firms' scope.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Only observation: /firm-master screen appears empty (~537 chars body) when super-admin sits on the 'All firms' scope. Iter 105 tested it under a company-scoped context. Main agent to confirm intended behaviour.
